case_title: LEANN NGUYEN VS. DAVID RAFAEL CAMACHO et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY NGUYEN, LEANN AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, DAVID RAFAEL YUAN, RAYLENE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-26-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, LEANN
TRIAL RESET TO AUG-30-2012 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF JUL-26-2012 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 45.00 - SERVED AUG-03-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT YUAN, RAYLENE

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-30-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO SEP-21-2012 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF ($45.00 FEE FOR SERVICE) SERVED AUG-03-2012, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, DAVID RAFAEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-21-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-21-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-21-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NGUYEN, LEANN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CAMACHO, DAVID RAFAEL YUAN, RAYLENE $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $140.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,140.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CAMACHO, DAVID RAFAEL YUAN, RAYLENE
